title: CrimsonOctobers Immersive Combat
description: Want more immersive combat without pillaring up with blocks? This datapack prevents players from building and breaking blocks while they are fighting!
body:
This datapack **changes your gamemode to adventure** whenever you **engage in combat** - with entities or players.
It prevents players from building and placing blocks while in combat.

Showcase: [https://youtu.be/nLMmfn8FYzo?si=wQfN77QdOheCDEwJ](https://youtu.be/nLMmfn8FYzo?si=wQfN77QdOheCDEwJ)

(Note that it's the first version of the datapack on the video, the updated 0.3 arleady has more features and a bugfix)

Should be compatibile with most of the mods, tested with epic fight.
*By default, it lasts for 8 seconds from taking damage. 
If you want to tweak it, go to data/immersive_combat/functions/start_combat and edit the value at the end of the 4th line. It's in ticks, so it's divided by 20 to get seconds. That's why default 160 results in 8 second.
